name: Egberto Gismonti
abstract: Egberto Amin Gismonti (born 5 December 1947) is a Brazilian composer, guitarist and pianist.

concerts.label: Egberto Gismonti, Danilo Pérez, Gonzalo Rubalcaba, and Chucho Valdés, Piano
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Maria Schneider
about_quotes.evidence: Egberto Gismonti or, different people from all over. Paco DeLucia. People whose music inspires me so that when I bring my thing to it, they bring something new to me
about_quotes.doc_title: Maria Schneider interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 12, 2001
